theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro hP2
  dsimp [Topology.P2] at hP2
  dsimp [Topology.P1]
  intro x hxA
  have hx_in : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := hP2 hxA
  have hsubset : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ closure (interior A) :=
    Set.interior_subset
  exact hsubset hx_in

theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    P2 (A := A) → P1 (A := A) := by
  intro h
  dsimp [P2] at h
  dsimp [P1]
  have : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ closure (interior A) :=
    interior_subset
  exact Set.Subset.trans h this
